floor_history.headline: recon: all 4 target andi-0xFF are natural zero_extendqisi2 of MULTI-USE QImode pseudos — plain u8 locals with NO masks predicted to emit the identical andis; the committed masks are likely decorative

frontier.hypothesis: Plain-u8 respelling with ZERO masks is byte-identical: `if (a0 == b)`, `if (a0 == 0x14)`, `(&D_801077B0)[a0]`, use a1 directly for all idx sites, `(&D_8008E75C)[a1]` at the tail
frontier.mechanism: zero_extendqisi2 emitted for every SImode use of a multi-use QImode pseudo; combine.c's single-use condition blocks the lbu fold (a0/x feed QImode +1 stores, a1 feeds two extend sites); block-local cse.c reuses the extend within a block and re-emits after the join — reproducing all 4 andis and the fresh-register allocation without any source mask
frontier.next_probe: Rewrite mottest_disp (src/code6cac_b.c:3627-3675) with plain u8 locals and no & 0xFF / (u8) casts, `& tools/wteng.ps1 main sandbox mottest_disp --disable all` expecting 0; then fresh layer-2 review per the judge constraint

frontier.hypothesis: If dropping the `idx` intermediate perturbs CSE grouping or allocation, keep `u8 idx = a1;` (a clean copy, not a mask) — the copy gets propagated but may anchor the extend expression
frontier.mechanism: cse.c/copy-propagation: `idx = a1` copies coalesce, but the named local can change which pseudo carries the extend; both spellings are mask-free
frontier.next_probe: Sweep the 2-4 mask-free variants (idx kept/dropped x tail-index a1/idx) in one call via tools/sweep_variants.py --func mottest_disp --file code6cac_b

frontier.hypothesis: If exactly one site diverges under the plain form, the divergence is a scheduling/CSE detail at that site, not a mask requirement — diagnose before considering any cast
frontier.mechanism: e.g. the `D_8010277A = 0x800` staging (addiu $v0,0x800 duplicated at lines ~78/89 across the branch) and the .L80033CFC shared-store tail are jump.c/cross-jump artifacts sensitive to statement placement
frontier.next_probe: objdiff the plain-form sandbox output against target, identify the first diverging site, and probe placement respellings (statement order, shared vs duplicated stores) per cross-jump-store-tail-merge / switch-break-shared-return-sched-hoist before any mask-family construct

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Four `u8 & 0xFF` / `(u8)u8var` masks with no semantic purpose: each forces an `andi` instruction that creates a new register for register-allocation/delay-slot scheduling control. They fail the 6-test checklist at tests 1 (no observable-output effect), 2 (no human programmer writes `(u8_var & 0xFF)` on an already-`u8` variable from spec), and 3 (the rationale is GCC-internals: force `andi`, create `$vN` so the original register stays live for the branch delay slot or a concurrent store). Not in the SOTN-accepted list. Function stays in main until a clean replacement that omits these masks (or demonstrates they close without them) is produced and passes a fresh layer-2 review.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
